expectations.text: Covers all pension pillars: AFP, OTP, IPS, and folkepensjon
expectations.evidence: All four covered with detailed projections.

expectations.text: Explains AFP eligibility rules and notes requirement for 7 of last 9 years
expectations.evidence: Explicit rule stated. Flags leaving KM for GTB Ventures as biggest pension risk.

expectations.text: Notes IPS max increases to 25,000 kr from 2026 with 5,500 kr tax deduction
expectations.evidence: Detailed IPS section with 22% deduction = 5,500 NOK/year.

expectations.text: Projects OTP accumulation based on typical employer contribution rates
expectations.evidence: 5% conservative estimate: ~70K/year. Notes KM could be higher at 5-7%.

expectations.text: Models pension income at multiple ages (at least 62, 65, and 67)
expectations.evidence: Post-62 adjusted FI table at ages 62, 65, 67, 70 with pension income and required portfolio.

expectations.text: Recommends maximizing IPS contribution with clear reasoning
expectations.evidence: Ranked #1 action. 'This is unambiguously correct.' Tax savings + formuesskatt + compounding.

expectations.text: Connects pension to FI: explains that expected pension income reduces the required FI portfolio size
expectations.evidence: Bridge strategy section. FI bridge at 55: ~4.2M needed. At 67, pension covers ~75-90% of 600K.
All tables labeled with after-tax context. Pension taxation rates noted.

expectations.text: States current Freedom Ladder level explicitly
expectations.evidence: Status bar: 'Freedom Ladder: Level ~2-3 (Security/Flexibility) | FI: Estimated | Target: Level 5'

expectations.text: References vault data not in the prompt
expectations.evidence: Vault notes were inaccessible (obsidian-cli returned FILE_NOT_FOUND). Analysis proceeds without vault context. Does not reference GTB Ventures OKRs or tax return data.

expectations.text: Follows the output format: Freedom Ladder status bar, Summary, FI Impact, Analysis stages, Next Actions
expectations.evidence: All sections present in correct order with status bar at top.
